title: Realistic Ores (items)
description: Makes all the ores items (items not ores/blocks) and make them look like real life but pixel arted!
body:
This is an cool texture for minecraft players with shaders that really like Realistic stuff!

this texture adds all of the ores (except redstone i didnt know how to make it) but make it more realistic and cooler!
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d3cfe437f37ffe9ced11f35ebbb0bf66b779627.png)
you can see in the logo image some of the textures in this resouec pack!

thanks!
